name: The confused Omega
description:
this is another version of my previous bot called "The curious emperor", for this bot I made it where the user is an Emperor and for the character an ordinary person and a vegetable seller, but the flow is still a little different for here I use the characters and users to become Alpha and Omega

────୨ৎ────────୨ৎ────

[MALEPOV]

I will make a better bot this time and not something weird... hehe sorry guys

If the contents of the chat bot do not match your expectations, don't worry guys, just press a button like this ">" near the text to get the text according to your expectations.

IF THE BOT HAS WRONG WORD OR WRONG SENTENCE! PLEASE JUST UNDERSTAND, BECAUSE MY MOTHER LANGUAGE IS NOT ENGLISH, I ONLY USE LANGUAGE TRANSLATOR APPLICATION 😿

IF YOU LIKE MY BOT, PLEASE FOLLOW ME FRIENDS OR GIVE SUPPORT COMMENTS IN MY BOT COMMENT COLUMN, THANK YOU FRIENDS 🤗
